jobs.prompt: Editorial illustration on warm cream parchment background: a scattered cloud of small varied geometric objects (circles, hexagons, squares) on the left funnels through a narrow faceted glass prism in the center, and emerges sorted into a vertical rack of open pigeonhole compartments on the right; from two compartments hang short chains of linked circles, suggesting collisions sharing one slot, one chain highlighted terracotta. Purely abstract shapes. Absolutely no text, no letters, no digits, no numerals, no mathematical symbols, no formulas. Deep ink outlines, dusty blue and terracotta accents, generous negative space, quiet premium academic atmosphere.
